methodology: Refactored to Empowered-style OKRs: a small set of company objectives, linked source objectives, source-level key results, explicit team ownership, and limited use of High Integrity Commitments.
description: Preparation Objectives for the next quarter.
okrDesignPrinciples: Objectives describe meaningful business and customer outcomes, not feature delivery.
Key results measure source objectives, while source objectives map upward into a small set of company objectives.
Every key result names executing and supporting teams so accountability is explicit.
High Integrity Commitments are used sparingly and only for work that is materially deadline-sensitive.

companyObjectives.title: 2026-Q2 Make execution reliably repeatable
companyObjectives.statement: Improve the operating system behind the product so launches, service recovery, reliability, and cross-functional delivery become predictably repeatable.
companyObjectives.okrDesignNotes: Keeps teams accountable for operational outcomes and avoids turning roadmap delivery into a checklist of feature shipments.

companyObjectives.title: 2026-Q2 Turn product progress into economic leverage
companyObjectives.statement: Translate better customer and operational outcomes into stronger revenue quality, retention, and strategic leverage for the business.
companyObjectives.okrDesignNotes: Separates commercial results from activity metrics so leaders can evaluate whether product work is compounding into business value.

objectives.title: 2026-Q2 Chief Marketing Officer / VP Marketing outcome goal
objectives.objective: Prepare to improve Marketing-Sourced Pipeline for Chief Marketing Officer / VP Marketing by advancing establish closed-loop attribution and reliable demand tracking. through revenue-aligned demand engine.

linkedCustomerKPIs.description: Total qualified pipeline value directly attributable to marketing activities.

linkedBusinessKPIs.description: Economic value created through improved pipeline generation, attribution clarity, and marketing efficiency.

keyResults.baseline: Baseline to be confirmed from quarterly reporting
keyResults.statement: Increase Marketing-Sourced Pipeline during the quarter.

executingTeams.intent: Lead the work to improve marketing-Sourced Pipeline via Audience management layer and Lead scoring engine.

supportingTeams.teamName: Enterprise Data Office - Enterprise Metric Layer
supportingTeams.intent: Support the KR by contributing capability for marketing-Sourced Pipeline, aligned with its focus on own the enterprise semantic layer, analytics, decision support, and executive operating model. This team specifically focuses on enterprise metric layer via Enterprise metric layer and Scenario planning engine.

supportingTeams.teamName: Marketing & Brand Systems - Icp Modeling Segmentation
supportingTeams.intent: Support the KR by contributing capability for marketing-Sourced Pipeline, aligned with its focus on own demand generation, lifecycle, content, and brand systems that drive qualified pipeline. This team specifically focuses on icp modeling segmentation via ICP modeling and segmentation and Multi-channel attribution system.

keyResults.commitmentRationale: This KR should be pursued as an outcome target with room for discovery, iteration, and tradeoff.

target1.label: 2026-Q3 target
target1.projectedValue: Current estimate: Marketing-Sourced Pipeline moves far enough to show clear momentum toward improve quarter over quarter, driven by increase Marketing-Sourced Pipeline during the quarter.

target2.label: 2026-year-end target
target2.projectedValue: Current estimate: Marketing-Sourced Pipeline ends the horizon sustainably ahead of today's baseline, with improve quarter over quarter holding across the broader operating model.
